text: Character education is very significant to maintain the national integrity to face new challenges of morality such as the occurrence of delinquency, social unrest and moral decline. This study aims to examine the implementation of Islamic character values through habituation method at SDN Babakan Sirna, Sukabumi. Methodologically, this study uses qualitative descriptive approach to investigate the purpose, structure, mechanism of evaluation and implementation of character education through habituation method. The data was collected through interview, observation and documentation. The results show that the habituation method is implemented in four aspects, namely daily akhlaq (moral character), ibadah (worship), annual Islamic celebration and nationalistic education. Students are able to develop and enhance their religious ibadah, discipline, empathy to others and environmental consciousness. The evaluation of the character education is carried out through the morning talk, teacher meeting and students performance record. The implementation of character education through habituation method in this school is supported by the school administrator, teachers competence, physical building and infrastructure. However, the implementation is hampered by lack of unity among teachers, students' personality and discipline. Therefore, the habituation method is very effective to promote Islamic character values into concrete actions.
explanation: The paragraph uses highly specific local context (a particular school in Sukabumi) and a nuanced qualitative-methods discussion that are typical of human-authored research; while polished, some generic phrasing leaves a small possibility of AI assistance.
